untranslatable_reason: Adam and Eve Double Bottom pattern requires visual pattern recognition of specific candle formations (narrow V-shaped vs. wide rounded bottoms with multiple spikes). The exact morphological characteristics cannot be precisely quantified using only standard technical indicators. Entry conditions depend on identifying two distinct bottom structures with specific shape properties that exceed the capability of allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using lower_wick (V-shape indicator) and breakout logic (close > prev_high), but this is insufficient to capture the nuanced pattern distinction between Adam (narrow, V-shaped) and Eve (wide, rounded with weeds). Exit condition uses reversion to 20-SMA as a conservative stop. Success rates mentioned: 37% in bull market; bear market rate not specified. Volume trend not specified in source.
